prompt: Using the provided reference image, recreate the same two foreground people in the same selfie composition, preserving their clothing, hairstyle silhouettes, hand gesture, and relative positions, but transform the photo into a crude hand-drawn digital doodle. Make it look like a simple MS Paint cartoon with thick black outlines, flat fills, intentionally rough proportions, minimal detail, and a plain light gray background. Remove the waterfront, sky, and all background people so only the 2 main subjects remain. Keep the face areas anonymized as large blurred rectangular blocks.
